We conclude that $a\gt 10 \%$ guardband for the minimum observed RDT combined with SECDED or Chipkill-like SSC error-correcting codes could prevent read disturbance bitflips at the cost of large read disturbance mitigation performance overheads (e.g., 45% performance loss for an RDT guardband of $50 \%$). We hope and believe future work on efficient online profiling mechanisms and configurable read disturbance mitigation techniques could remedy the challenges imposed on today’s read disturbance mitigations by the variable read disturbance phenomenon.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 DRAM 芯片容易出现读取干扰错误。这些错误表现为受害者 DRAM 行中的安全关键位翻转，该行物理上靠近重复激活（打开）的攻击者行 (RowHammer) 或长时间保持打开的攻击者行 (RowPress)。最先进的读干扰缓解措施依赖于每个 DRAM 行（现代系统中有数百万或数十亿）的读干扰阈值 ($R D T$)（例如，引发第一个 RowHammer 或 RowPress 位翻转所需的攻击者行激活数量）的准确和详尽的表征，以安全且低开销地防止读干扰位翻转。我们首次通过实验证明 DRAM 行的 RDT 随着时间的推移会发生显着且不可预测的变化。我们将这种新现象称为变量读取干扰（VRD）。我们使用来自三个主要制造商的 160 个 DDR4 芯片和 4 个 HBM2 芯片进行了广泛的实验，得出了三个关键观察结果。首先，相对较少的 RDT 测量不太可能准确识别 DRAM 行的 RDT。 DRAM 行的最小 RDT 在数万次测量后出现（例如，最多 94,467 次），并且 DRAM 行的最小 RDT 比该行观察到的最大 RDT 小 3.5 倍。其次，随着芯片密度的增加或技术节点尺寸的减小，用相对少量的测量准确识别行 RDT 的概率会降低。第三，数据模式、攻击行保持打开状态的时间量以及温度会影响准确识别 DRAM 行 RDT 的概率。我们的实证结果对读取干扰缓解技术的安全保证具有影响：如果不能准确识别 DRAM 行的 RDT，这些技术很容易变得不安全。我们讨论并评估了使用 RDT 保护带和纠错码来减轻 RDT 随时间变化不可预测的情况下的读取干扰位翻转。我们得出的结论是，最小观察到的 RDT 的 $a\gt 10 \%$ 防护带与 SECDED 或类似 Chipkill 的 SSC 纠错码相结合，可以防止读取干扰位翻转，但代价是大量的读取干扰缓解性能开销（例如，$50 \%$ 的 RDT 防护带会导致 45% 的性能损失）。我们希望并相信，未来在高效在线分析机制和可配置读取干扰缓解技术方面的工作可以解决当今可变读取干扰现象对读取干扰缓解带来的挑战。

items.title: ARTEMIS: Agile Discovery of Efficient Real-Time Systems-on-Chips in the Heterogeneous Era.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous systems-on-chips (SoCs) are pivotal for real-time applications like autonomous driving, as they blend the versatility of CPUs with the efficiency of accelerator IPs. However, evolving application demands necessitate domain-specific SoCs to meet real-time deadlines within strict power and area constraints. While prior research focused on microarchitectural optimizations, overlooking broader system-level considerations can lead to suboptimal design decisions. Thus, there is a need to elevate the abstraction level of design space exploration (DSE) to the SoC level. However, SoC-level DSE is challenging due to the vast design space, encompassing microarchitectural parameters and dynamic task-to-hardware mapping choices based on runtime characteristics and real-time constraints. This paper proposes a systematic and agile methodology, called ARTEMIS, for efficient DSE of real-time, domain-specific SoCs that are constrained by task deadlines, power, and area. The core concept involves integrating a dynamic SoC scheduler to reduce the design space by eliminating the mapping dimension. Enhanced scheduling policies, incorporating techniques like task procrastination and memory-traffic/energy awareness, expedite navigation through the pruned design space. Additionally, DSE heuristics are optimized with real-time deadline and power/areaaware ranking mechanisms. ARTEMIS is evaluated on autonomous vehicle (AV) and augmented/virtual reality (AR/VR) applications, and additionally validated on an FPGA. Compared to the state-of-the-art, DSE using ARTEMIS converges 5.1$12.8 \times$ faster, while yielding SoCs that meet $100 \%$ real-time deadlines with $1.2-3 \times$ better throughput at iso-area or up to $2.4 \times$ lower area for at iso-input-rate. ARTEMIS thus enables DSE of large designs with tractable simulation resources, without compromising on the power-performance-area metrics of the explored SoC design.
items.abstract_zh: 异构片上系统 (SoC) 对于自动驾驶等实时应用至关重要，因为它们将 CPU 的多功能性与加速器 IP 的效率融为一体。然而，不断发展的应用需求需要特定领域的 SoC 来满足严格的功耗和面积限制内的实时期限。虽然之前的研究主要集中在微架构优化上，但忽视更广泛的系统级考虑因素可能会导致设计决策不理想。因此，需要将设计空间探索（DSE）的抽象级别提升到SoC级别。然而，由于设计空间巨大，包括微架构参数以及基于运行时特性和实时约束的动态任务到硬件映射选择，SoC 级 DSE 具有挑战性。本文提出了一种称为 ARTEMIS 的系统性敏捷方法，用于对受任务期限、功耗和面积限制的实时、特定领域 SoC 进行高效 DSE。核心概念涉及集成动态 SoC 调度器，通过消除映射维度来减少设计空间。增强的调度策略，结合任务拖延和内存流量/能量感知等技术，可以加快在修剪后的设计空间中的导航。此外，DSE 启发法还通过实时截止日期和功率/区域感知排名机制进行了优化。 ARTEMIS is evaluated on autonomous vehicle (AV) and augmented/virtual reality (AR/VR) applications, and additionally validated on an FPGA.与最先进的技术相比，使用 ARTEMIS 的 DSE 收敛速度快了 5.1$12.8 \times$，同时生成的 SoC 可以满足 $100 \%$ 的实时截止日期，在 iso 区域吞吐量提高 1.2-3 \times$，或者在 iso 输入速率下吞吐量降低高达 $2.4 \times$。因此，ARTEMIS 能够利用易于处理的仿真资源对大型设计进行 DSE，而不会影响所探索的 SoC 设计的功耗性能面积指标。

items.title: InstAttention: In-Storage Attention Offloading for Cost-Effective Long-Context LLM Inference.
items.abstract: The widespread of Large Language Models (LLMs) marks a significant milestone in generative AI. Nevertheless, the increasing context length and batch size in offline LLM inference escalate the memory requirement of the key-value (KV) cache, which imposes a huge burden on the GPU VRAM, especially for resource-constrained scenarios (e.g., edge computing). Several cost-effective solutions leverage host memory or SSDs to reduce storage costs for offline inference scenarios and improve the throughput. Nevertheless, they suffer from significant performance penalties imposed by intensive KV cache accesses due to limited PCIe bandwidth. To address these issues, we propose InstAttention, a novel LLM inference system that offloads the most performance-critical computation (i.e., attention in decoding phase) and data (i.e., KV cache) parts to Computational Storage Drives (CSDs), which minimize the enormous KV transfer overheads. InstAttention designs a dedicated flashaware in-storage attention engine with KV cache management mechanisms to exploit the high internal bandwidths of CSDs instead of being limited by the PCIe bandwidth. The optimized P2P transmission between GPU and CSDs further reduces data migration overheads. Experimental results demonstrate that for a 13B model using an NVIDIA A6000 GPU, InstAttention improves throughput for long-sequence inference by up to $11.1 \times$, compared to existing SSD-based solutions such as FlexGen.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的广泛应用标志着生成人工智能的一个重要里程碑。然而，离线LLM推理中不断增加的上下文长度和批量大小增加了键值（KV）缓存的内存需求，这给GPU VRAM带来了巨大的负担，特别是对于资源受限的场景（例如边缘计算）。多种经济高效的解决方案利用主机内存或 SSD 来降低离线推理场景的存储成本并提高吞吐量。然而，由于 PCIe 带宽有限，密集的 KV 缓存访问给它们带来了严重的性能损失。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 InstAttention，这是一种新颖的 LLM 推理系统，它将对性能最关键的计算（即解码阶段的注意力）和数据（即 KV 缓存）部分卸载到计算存储驱动器（CSD），从而最大限度地减少巨大的 KV 传输开销。 InstAttention 设计了一个具有 KV 缓存管理机制的专用闪存感知存储内注意力引擎，以利用 CSD 的高内部带宽，而不是受到 PCIe 带宽的限制。 GPU和CSD之间优化的P2P传输进一步减少了数据迁移开销。实验结果表明，对于使用 NVIDIA A6000 GPU 的 13B 模型，与现有基于 SSD 的解决方案（例如 FlexGen）相比，InstAttention 将长序列推理的吞吐量提高了高达 11.1 美元\times$。

items.title: EDA: Energy-Efficient Inter-Layer Model Compilation for Edge DNN Inference Acceleration.
items.abstract: Modern handheld devices often employ neural processing units (NPUs) to accelerate deep neural network (DNN) inference applications. Unlike the AI accelerator of a data center, the NPU of an edge device has strict price and energy budgets. In an NPU, DRAM memory consumes much energy due to frequent data movement across on-chip and off-chip memory. The inter-layer operator scheduling has been shown to reduce off-chip memory transactions by reusing DNN operator outputs on the on-chip memory space. However, it often deeply traverses operators and substantially increases off-chip memory data traffic when the on-chip memory of an NPU decreases in size. Consequently, this work creates a DNN model compilation framework called EDA that transparently improves the energy efficiency of an NPU by adjusting the operator traversal depth of the inter-layer operator scheduling in a stacked DNN model. First, EDA transforms a DNN model into a tensor-splitting model. Second, EDA breaks the tensor-splitting model graph into multiple subgraphs. Third, the EDA inter-layer cost model quickly determines the depth of each subgraph. Fourth, EDA properly manages the on-chip shared memory space of an NPU to avoid overusing memory space. Finally, EDA devises the operator grouping method to improve the MAC unit and on-chip memory space utilization. EDA improves the geometric means of $2.08 \times$ and $2.39 \times$, respectively, in energy efficiency and performance over the NPU with designated memory buffers.
items.abstract_zh: 现代手持设备通常采用神经处理单元 (NPU) 来加速深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理应用。与数据中心的人工智能加速器不同，边缘设备的 NPU 具有严格的价格和能源预算。在 NPU 中，由于片上和片外存储器之间频繁的数据移动，DRAM 存储器消耗大量能量。层间算子调度已被证明可以通过在片上内存空间上重用 DNN 算子输出来减少片外内存事务。然而，当NPU的片上存储器尺寸减小时，它常常会深度遍历算子并大幅增加片外存储器数据流量。因此，这项工作创建了一个名为 EDA 的 DNN 模型编译框架，通过调整堆叠 DNN 模型中层间算子调度的算子遍历深度，透明地提高了 NPU 的能效。首先，EDA 将 DNN 模型转换为张量分割模型。其次，EDA 将张量分割模型图分解为多个子图。第三，EDA层间成本模型快速确定每个子图的深度。第四，EDA妥善管理NPU的片上共享内存空间，避免过度使用内存空间。最后，EDA设计了算子分组方法，以提高MAC单元和片上存储空间利用率。与具有指定内存缓冲区的 NPU 相比，EDA 在能源效率和性能方面的几何平均值分别提高了 2.08 美元和 2.39 美元。

items.title: FHENDI: A Near-DRAM Accelerator for Compiler-Generated Fully Homomorphic Encryption Applications.
items.abstract: Fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) is a powerful cryptographic technique that enables computation on encrypted data without needing to decrypt it. It has broad applications in scenarios where sensitive data needs to be processed in the cloud or in other untrusted environments. FHE applications are both compute- and memory-intensive, owing to expensive operations on large data. While prior works address the challenges of efficient compute using dedicated hardware, expensive memory transfers still remain a major limiting factor. In this work, we propose a hierarchical near-DRAM processing (NDP) solution for FHE applications, called FHENDI, that harnesses the massive DRAM bank bandwidth. We observe various data access patterns in FHE that reveal distinct levels of parallelism: element-wise, limb-wise, coefficient-wise, and ciphertext-wise. FHENDI exploits these levels of parallelism to map FHE operations and data onto different hierarchies of our design, while addressing three major challenges with NDP for FHE: (i) the lack of bank-to-bank communication support, (ii) limited die-to-die bandwidth, and (iii) large memory access latencies. We resolve the first problem through a novel, conflict-free mapping algorithm built atop localized permutation networks that enables efficient element-wise and butterfly operations in FHE. The second problem is addressed by pipelining the execution of parallel bootstrap operations observed in compiled FHE workloads. Finally, we hide the memory access latency behind computation latency by exploiting a dual-banking scheme and subarray-level parallelism (SLP) of the DRAM banks. We evaluate FHENDI using representative workloads in the domains of privacy-preserving machine learning inference on CNNs and Transformers, database range query, and sorting, that are obtained using a compiler framework called HElayers. We compare FHENDI with a server-class CPU and GPU running the state-of-the-art HEaaN library, and an FHE accelerator ASIC, and report mean speedups of $2145.8 \times, 118.29 \times$, and $2.45 \times$, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密 (FHE) 是一种强大的加密技术，无需解密即可对加密数据进行计算。在需要在云端或其他不可信环境中处理敏感数据的场景中具有广泛的应用。由于对大数据的操作成本高昂，FHE 应用程序属于计算密集型和内存密集型。虽然之前的工作解决了使用专用硬件进行高效计算的挑战，但昂贵的内存传输仍然是一个主要限制因素。在这项工作中，我们为 FHE 应用提出了一种分层近 DRAM 处理 (NDP) 解决方案，称为 FHENDI，它利用海量 DRAM 组带宽。我们观察到 FHE 中的各种数据访问模式揭示了不同级别的并行性：逐元素、逐肢体、逐系数和逐密文。 FHENDI 利用这些并行性级别将 FHE 操作和数据映射到我们设计的不同层次结构，同时解决 FHE 的 NDP 的三个主要挑战：(i) 缺乏存储体到存储体的通信支持，(ii) 有限的芯片到芯片带宽，以及 (iii) 较大的内存访问延迟。我们通过一种新颖的、无冲突的映射算法解决了第一个问题，该算法建立在局部置换网络之上，该算法在 FHE 中实现高效的逐元素和蝴蝶运算。第二个问题是通过管道化在编译的 FHE 工作负载中观察到的并行引导操作的执行来解决的。最后，我们通过利用 DRAM 组的双存储方案和子阵列级并行性 (SLP)，将内存访问延迟隐藏在计算延迟背后。我们使用 CNN 和 Transformer 上的隐私保护机器学习推理、数据库范围查询和排序领域的代表性工作负载来评估 FHENDI，这些工作负载是使用名为 HElayers 的编译器框架获得的。我们将 FHENDI 与运行最先进的 HEaaN 库的服务器级 CPU 和 GPU 以及 FHE 加速器 ASIC 进行比较，报告平均加速分别为 2145.8 美元、118.29 倍和 2.45 美元。

items.title: FIGLUT: An Energy-Efficient Accelerator Design for FP-INT GEMM Using Look-Up Tables.
items.abstract: Weight-only quantization has emerged as a promising solution to the deployment challenges of large language models (LLMs). However, it necessitates FP-INT operations, which make implementation on general-purpose hardware like GPUs difficult. In this paper, we propose FIGLUT, an efficient look-up table (LUT)-based GEMM accelerator architecture. Instead of performing traditional arithmetic operations, FIGLUT retrieves precomputed values from an LUT based on weight patterns, significantly reducing the computational complexity. We also introduce a novel LUT design that addresses the limitations of conventional memory architectures. To further improve LUT-based operations, we propose a half-size LUT combined with a dedicated decoding and multiplexing unit. FIGLUT efficiently supports different bit precisions and quantization methods using a single fixed hardware configuration. For the same 3-bit weight precision, FIGLUT demonstrates 59% higher TOPS/W and 20% lower perplexity than state-of-the-art accelerator design. When targeting the same perplexity, FIGLUT achieves $98 \%$ higher TOPS/W by performing 2.4-bit operations.
items.abstract_zh: 仅权重量化已成为解决大型语言模型 (LLM) 部署挑战的有前途的解决方案。然而，它需要 FP-INT 运算，这使得在 GPU 等通用硬件上实现变得困难。在本文中，我们提出了FIGLUT，一种基于高效查找表（LUT）的GEMM加速器架构。 FIGLUT 不执行传统的算术运算，而是根据权重模式从 LUT 中检索预先计算的值，从而显着降低了计算复杂性。我们还引入了一种新颖的 LUT 设计，可以解决传统内存架构的局限性。为了进一步改进基于 LUT 的操作，我们提出了与专用解码和复用单元相结合的半尺寸 LUT。 Figlut 使用单一固定硬件配置有效支持不同的位精度和量化方法。对于相同的 3 位权重精度，FIGLUT 的 TOPS/W 比最先进的加速器设计高 59%，困惑度低 20%。当针对相同的困惑度时，FIGLUT 通过执行 2.4 位操作实现了 $98 \%$ 高的 TOPS/W。

items.title: AutoRFM: Scaling Low-Cost in-DRAM Trackers to Ultra-Low Rowhammer Thresholds.
items.abstract: In-DRAM Rowhammer mitigation has the potential to solve the Rowhammer problem without relying on other parts of the system. In-DRAM mitigation requires space (to identify the aggressor rows) and time (to perform the victim refresh). To reduce the storage overheads of tracking, recent works have developed secure low-cost in-DRAM trackers that can probabilistically identify aggressor rows. To obtain the time required for mitigation, these trackers rely on the Refresh Management (RFM) command introduced in DDR5. As RFM stalls the bank for a latency of 200ns-400ns, frequent use of RFM can cause significant slowdowns. For example, scaling the recent MINT tracker to a threshold of 100 incurs 33% slowdown. The goal of this paper is to enable low-cost trackers to tolerate ultralow thresholds (sub-100) while incurring negligible slowdown. This paper proposes AutoRFM, a transparent RFM mechanism that can provide mitigation time to the DRAM chips without stalling the bank. The key insight in AutoRFM is to leverage the subarray structure (e.g. each bank contains 256 subarrays) and perform mitigation on only one of the subarrays. Operations to all subarrays that are not under mitigation are serviced without any interruption. If activation occurs to the subarray under mitigation, the DRAM chip sends an ALERT signal informing the Memory Controller to retry after a predefined time. As AutoRFM works best if consecutive requests to the same bank do not get mapped to the same subarray, we use Randomized Memory Mapping to break the spatial correlation between memory accesses. Furthermore, we also develop a Fractal Mitigation Algorithm that can tolerate transitive attacks (such as Half-Double) without requiring recursive mitigations to the same subarray. Our design ensures that a declined request does not have to wait more than 200 ns before retrying, thus limiting the slowdown and avoiding any potential for denial of service. Our evaluations, with SPEC, GAP, and stream workloads, show that AutoRFM enables low-cost trackers to tolerate a threshold of as low as 74 while incurring an average slowdown of only 3.1%.
items.abstract_zh: DRAM 内 Rowhammer 缓解措施有可能在不依赖系统其他部分的情况下解决 Rowhammer 问题。 DRAM 内缓解需要空间（以识别攻击者行）和时间（以执行受害者刷新）。为了减少跟踪的存储开销，最近的工作开发了安全的低成本 DRAM 跟踪器，可以概率性地识别攻击者行。为了获得缓解所需的时间，这些跟踪器依赖于 DDR5 中引入的刷新管理 (RFM) 命令。由于 RFM 使存储库延迟 200ns-400ns，频繁使用 RFM 可能会导致速度显着降低。例如，将最近的 MINT 跟踪器缩放到阈值 100 会导致 33% 的减速。本文的目标是使低成本跟踪器能够承受超低阈值（低于 100），同时造成的速度下降可以忽略不计。本文提出了 AutoRFM，这是一种透明的 RFM 机制，可以为 DRAM 芯片提供缓解时间，而不会导致存储体停顿。 AutoRFM 的关键见解是利用子阵列结构（例如，每个组包含 256 个子阵列）并仅对其中一个子阵列执行缓解措施。对未受到缓解的所有子阵列的操作都不会中断。如果受缓解的子阵列发生激活，DRAM 芯片会发送警报信号，通知内存控制器在预定义时间后重试。由于如果对同一存储体的连续请求未映射到同一子数组，则 AutoRFM 效果最佳，因此我们使用随机内存映射来打破内存访问之间的空间相关性。此外，我们还开发了一种分形缓解算法，可以容忍传递攻击（例如 Half-Double），而不需要对同一子数组进行递归缓解。我们的设计确保被拒绝的请求在重试之前不必等待超过 200 ns，从而限制速度减慢并避免任何潜在的拒绝服务。我们对 SPEC、GAP 和流工作负载的评估表明，AutoRFM 使低成本跟踪器能够容忍低至 74 的阈值，同时平均速度仅为 3.1%。

items.title: SPARK: Sparsity Aware, Low Area, Energy-Efficient, Near-memory Architecture for Accelerating Linear Programming Problems.
items.abstract: Integer Linear Programming (ILP) is an important mathematical approach for solving time-sensitive real-life optimization problems, including network routing, map routing, traffic scheduling, etc. However, the algorithms for solving ILPs are typically sparse and branch-intensive, and not CPU/GPU friendly. In the paper “What could a million cores do to solve Integer programs”, Koch et al. [40] presented data illustrating that Integer Linear Programming (ILP) applications take tens of hours of execution time even on the largest parallel computers. Long execution time is a problem because many real-life applications need a decision in seconds or minutes. The widely used ILP solvers, like Gurobi (optimized for CPUs), perform software-based optimizations to handle the inherent sparsity in ILPs but still do not meet decision threshold because of the limited throughput of CPUs. GPUs are suited for large-sized dot-product compute, however, GPU-based ILP solvers also do not meet decision thresholds as (i) GPU is not sparsity friendly and (ii) GPU incurs thread divergence for branching, resulting in under-utilization of streaming engines and periodic host-GPU interaction. We propose SPARK, a sparsity-aware, reuse-aware, energy-efficient, reconfigurable, near-cache ILP architecture that (i) re-configures the existing L1 cache present in CPUs to perform near-cache acceleration with easy integration into the baseline CPU pipeline with minimal area overhead ($\sim 1.4 \%$ of a CPU), (ii) performs near-cache sparsity detection and sparsity-aware compute, reducing the number of insignificant computations, and data movement energy overheads, (iii) leverages the computational patterns present in algorithms used for solving ILP to realize a reuse-aware architecture, and (iv) is applicable to solving sparse and dense ILPs and LPs (Linear Programs). We observe $15 x / 20 x$, and $152 x / 740 x$ performance/energy improvement over AMD’s Zen3 CPU, and Nvidia’s Tesla v100 GPU for sparse reallife ILPs in Mixed Integer Programming library (MIPLIB 2017). For sparse LPs (non-integer), SPARK achieves 7-17x/103-250x performance/energy improvement over CPU/ GPU indicating SPARK’s broad applicability.
items.abstract_zh: 整数线性规划（ILP）是解决时间敏感的现实优化问题的重要数学方法，包括网络路由、地图路由、流量调度等。然而，求解ILP的算法通常是稀疏的、分支密集的，并且对CPU/GPU不友好。 Koch 等人在论文“一百万个核心可以做什么来解决整数程序”中。 [40] 提供的数据表明，即使在最大的并行计算机上，整数线性规划（ILP）应用程序也需要数十小时的执行时间。执行时间长是一个问题，因为许多现实应用程序需要在几秒钟或几分钟内做出决定。广泛使用的 ILP 求解器，例如 Gurobi（针对 CPU 进行了优化），执行基于软件的优化来处理 ILP 中固有的稀疏性，但由于 CPU 的吞吐量有限，仍然无法满足决策阈值。 GPU 适用于大型点积计算，但是，基于 GPU 的 ILP 求解器也无法满足决策阈值，因为 (i) GPU 不适合稀疏性，以及 (ii) GPU 会导致分支线程发散，从而导致流引擎利用率不足和定期主机与 GPU 交互。我们提出了 SPARK，一种稀疏感知、重用感知、节能、可重新配置、近缓存 ILP 架构，它 (i) 重新配置 CPU 中现有的 L1 缓存以执行近缓存加速，并以最小的面积开销轻松集成到基线 CPU 管道中（CPU 的 $\sim 1.4 \%$），(ii) 执行近缓存稀疏性检测和稀疏感知计算，减少无关紧要的计算数量，和数据移动能量开销，(iii) 利用用于解决 ILP 的算法中存在的计算模式来实现重用感知架构，以及 (iv) 适用于解决稀疏和密集 ILP 和 LP（线性程序）。我们观察到，在混合整数编程库（MIPLIB 2017）中，对于现实生活中的稀疏 ILP，AMD 的 Zen3 CPU 和 Nvidia 的 Tesla v100 GPU 的性能/能耗提高了 15 x / 20 x$ 和 152 x / 740 x$。对于稀疏 LP（非整数），SPARK 比 CPU/GPU 实现了 7-17 倍/103-250 倍的性能/能耗改进，表明 SPARK 具有广泛的适用性。

items.title: Architecting Value Prediction around In-Order Execution.
items.abstract: In the search for performance, in-order execution cannot expect to prevail as older long latency instructions prevent younger ones from issuing. Although stall-on-use processors allow independent instructions to issue in the shadow of a cache miss, the compiler cannot always find enough independent work to keep pipeline resources busy. In this paper, we study how both value prediction based on address prediction and direct value prediction can be built into an in-order pipeline to unlock significant performance. We further show that the in-order execution property provides advantages in that the pipeline may speculate aggressively without suffering from any recovery penalty. Finally, we combine this data speculation infrastructure with a reworked cache hierarchy that relies on a fast first level cache that can be written speculatively. We show that such an in-order pipeline can reach a performance level that is comparable to an equally - although moderately - wide out-of-order processor, without requiring support for partial out-of-order execution such as out-of-order memory hazard handling or full-fledged register renaming. Overall, we increase the performance of a 32 -entry scoreboard, 4-issue in-order processor based on a scaled up Open Hardware Group CVA6 by 38.4% (geomean), achieving $\mathbf{8 6. 7 \%}$ and $\mathbf{4 6. 3 \%}$ of the gains brought by comparable out-of-order processors featuring 32/16-entry and 64/32-entry Reorder Buffer and scheduler, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 在追求性能的过程中，有序执行不能指望占上风，因为较旧的长延迟指令会阻止较新指令的发出。尽管使用时停顿处理器允许在缓存未命中的情况下发出独立指令，但编译器并不总能找到足够的独立工作来保持管道资源繁忙。在本文中，我们研究了如何将基于地址预测的值预测和直接值预测构建到有序管道中以释放显着的性能。我们进一步表明，按顺序执行属性提供的优势在于管道可以积极推测而不会遭受任何恢复损失。最后，我们将此数据推测基础设施与重新设计的缓存层次结构相结合，该层次结构依赖于可以推测写入的快速第一级缓存。我们证明，这样的有序管道可以达到与同等宽度的乱序处理器相当的性能水平，而不需要支持部分乱序执行，例如乱序内存危险处理或成熟的寄存器重命名。总体而言，我们将基于扩展的开放硬件组 CVA6 的 32 条目记分板、4 问题有序处理器的性能提高了 38.4%（几何均值），实现了具有 32/16 条目和分别为 64/32 条目重新排序缓冲区和调度程序。

items.title: Machine Learning-Guided Memory Optimization for DLRM Inference on Tiered Memory.
items.abstract: Deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) are widely used in industry, and their memory capacity requirements reach the terabyte scale. Tiered memory architectures provide a cost-effective solution but introduce challenges in embedding-vector placement due to complex embedding-access patterns. We propose RecMG, a machine learning (ML)-guided system for vector caching and prefetching on tiered memory. RecMG accurately predicts accesses to embedding vectors with long reuse distances or few reuses. The design of RecMG focuses on making ML feasible in the context of DLRM inference by addressing unique challenges in data labeling and navigating the search space for embedding-vector placement. By employing separate ML models for caching and prefetching, plus a novel differentiable loss function, RecMG narrows the prefetching search space and minimizes on-demand fetches. Compared to state-of-the-art temporal, spatial, and ML-based prefetchers, RecMG reduces on-demand fetches by $2.2 \times, 2.8 \times$, and $1.5 \times$, respectively. In industrial-scale DLRM inference scenarios, RecMG effectively reduces end-to-end DLRM inference time by up to 43%.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）在工业界得到广泛应用，其内存容量需求达到TB级。分层内存架构提供了一种经济高效的解决方案，但由于复杂的嵌入访问模式，给嵌入向量放置带来了挑战。我们提出了 RecMG，这是一种机器学习 (ML) 引导的系统，用于在分层内存上进行矢量缓存和预取。 RecMG 可以准确预测对重用距离长或重用少的嵌入向量的访问。 RecMG 的设计重点是通过解决数据标记中的独特挑战以及导航嵌入向量放置的搜索空间，使 ML 在 DLRM 推理的背景下变得可行。通过采用单独的 ML 模型进行缓存和预取，加上新颖的可微损失函数，RecMG 缩小了预取搜索空间并最大限度地减少了按需提取。与最先进的时间、空间和基于 ML 的预取器相比，RecMG 将按需提取分别减少了 2.2 美元、2.8 倍和 1.5 美元。在工业级DLRM推理场景中，RecMG有效减少端到端DLRM推理时间高达43%。

items.title: HILP: Accounting for Workload-Level Parallelism in System-on-Chip Design Space Exploration.
items.abstract: High-performance System-on-Chip (SoC) architectures are becoming increasingly complex and heterogeneous, and the days when a single application could utilize all of an SoC’s hardware resources are all but over. The SoC’s workload, i.e., the set of independent applications that the SoC typically executes, therefore has a significant impact on its efficiency. Accounting for Workload-Level Parallelism (WLP) in early-stage design space exploration is thus critical as later-stage analysis steps must focus on favorable design points to yield optimal results. Unfortunately, state-of-the-art MultiAmdahl and Gables fall short because they only model the extremes of minimal and maximal WLP. We hence propose HILP, the first early-stage design space exploration approach for heterogeneous SoCs that fully accounts for WLP. Our key observation is that scheduling a workload of independent multi-phase applications on a heterogeneous SoC is an instance of the classic job-shop scheduling optimization problem and thus can be solved using integer linear programming. HILP therefore uses a high-performance integer linear programming solver to find a near-optimal schedule that minimizes the overall execution time of the workload, i.e., it schedules the dependent phases of all applications in the workload on the cores and accelerators of the target SoC to maximize performance while respecting power consumption and memory bandwidth constraints. We validate HILP by demonstrating that it captures the performance effects of Amdahl’s law, the memory wall, and dark silicon, and then use it to explore the impact of WLP across a large SoC design space, yielding multiple insights. The key takeaway is that modeling WLP is necessary to ensure that more detailed, later-stage design tasks focus on the most favorable parts of the vast design space of heterogeneous SoCs.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能片上系统 (SoC) 架构变得越来越复杂和异构，单个应用程序可以利用 SoC 的所有硬件资源的时代几乎已经结束。因此，SoC 的工作负载（即 SoC 通常执行的一组独立应用程序）对其效率有重大影响。因此，在早期设计空间探索中考虑工作负载级并行性 (WLP) 至关重要，因为后期分析步骤必须关注有利的设计点以产生最佳结果。不幸的是，最先进的 MultiAmdahl 和 Gables 还不够，因为它们只对最小和最大 WLP 的极端情况进行建模。因此，我们提出 HILP，这是第一个完全考虑 WLP 的异构 SoC 早期设计空间探索方法。我们的主要观察结果是，在异构 SoC 上调度独立多阶段应用程序的工作负载是经典作业车间调度优化问题的一个实例，因此可以使用整数线性规划来解决。因此，HILP 使用高性能整数线性规划求解器来找到近乎最优的调度，从而最大限度地减少工作负载的总体执行时间，即，它将工作负载中所有应用程序的依赖阶段调度到目标 SoC 的内核和加速器上，以最大限度地提高性能，同时考虑功耗和内存带宽限制。我们通过证明 HILP 捕获了阿姆达尔定律、内存墙和暗硅的性能影响来验证 HILP，然后用它来探索 WLP 在大型 SoC 设计空间中的影响，从而产生多种见解。关键要点是，WLP 建模对于确保更详细的后期设计任务集中在异构 SoC 的巨大设计空间中最有利的部分是必要的。

items.title: FACIL: Flexible DRAM Address Mapping for SoC-PIM Cooperative On-device LLM Inference.
items.abstract: The rise of on-device inference of large language models (LLMs) is rapidly escalating the demand for memory-intensive operations on edge devices. While DRAMbased processing-in-memory (PIM) is a promising solution for overcoming the memory wall, edge devices require PIM to function both as a compute unit and a memory device due to their limited memory capacity. Such PIM-enabled memory complicates the partition and placement of a tensor into DRAM banks in a PIM-operable manner. Notably, we highlight that LLM weights need to be accessible by both PIM and system-on-chip (SoC) processors, as the same weights are used for both SoC-favorable GEMM and PIM-favorable GEMV operations. This necessitates different memory mappings for PIM and SoC processors, leading to potential re-layout costs when switching between the two. To address this challenge, we propose FACIL, a flexible DRAM address mapping solution that efficiently places tensors in DRAM for PIM operations while allowing SoC processors to access the same data using contiguous virtual addresses. FACIL consists of (i) a memory controller that assigns different DRAM address mapping to the page offset bits of each huge page and (ii) a user-level library that determines the appropriate DRAM address mapping. We demonstrate that enabling re-layout-free access of both PIM and SoC processor benefits LLM inference on various on-device LLM tasks, including short conversation and code autocompletion, reducing the time-to-first-token by $2.37 \times$ and $2.63 \times$, respectively, over the SoC-PIM baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的设备端推理的兴起正在迅速增加对边缘设备上内存密集型操作的需求。虽然基于 DRAM 的内存处理 (PIM) 是克服内存墙的一种有前景的解决方案，但由于内存容量有限，边缘设备需要 PIM 既充当计算单元又充当内存设备。这种启用 PIM 的存储器使张量以 PIM 可操作方式划分和放置到 DRAM 组中变得复杂。值得注意的是，我们强调 LLM 权重需要可由 PIM 和片上系统 (SoC) 处理器访问，因为相同的权重用于有利于 SoC 的 GEMM 和有利于 PIM 的 GEMV 操作。这需要 PIM 和 SoC 处理器使用不同的内存映射，从而导致在两者之间切换时潜在的重新布局成本。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 FACIL，这是一种灵活的 DRAM 地址映射解决方案，可有效地将张量放置在 DRAM 中以进行 PIM 操作，同时允许 SoC 处理器使用连续的虚拟地址访问相同的数据。 FACIL 由 (i) 一个内存控制器（将不同的 DRAM 地址映射分配给每个大页的页偏移位）和 (ii) 一个用户级库（用于确定适当的 DRAM 地址映射）组成。我们证明，启用 PIM 和 SoC 处理器的免重新布局访问有利于各种设备上 LLM 任务的 LLM 推理，包括简短对话和代码自动完成，与 SoC-PIM 基线相比，首次令牌时间分别缩短了 2.37 美元和 2.63 美元。

items.title: Delinquent Loop Pre-execution Using Predicated Helper Threads.
items.abstract: Branch pre-execution targets delinquent branches that are not predictable by conventional branch predictors. Helper threads attempt to resolve branches ahead of the main thread. Pre-executed branch outcomes are communicated to the main thread’s fetch unit via a global branch queue or local branch queues (one per branch PC). Two key challenges are discussed in this paper. 1) Handling a delinquent branch b2 that is control-dependent on another delinquent branch b1. Prior works that include both branches resort to branch prediction of b1 in the helper thread to determine whether or not to pre-execute b2. But b1 is hard-to-predict and the misprediction bottleneck merely shifts from the main thread to the helper thread. 2) Handling a store instruction that both influences a delinquent branch and is control-dependent on it. We propose predicated helper threads (Phelps) to address these challenges. Phelps constructs a helper thread for each inner loop containing delinquent branches. All delinquent branches, even control-dependent ones (b2), are unconditionally pre-executed in each loop iteration. Per-branch queues are managed in lockstep based on loop iterations, allowing the helper thread to deposit outcomes for both b1 and b2 each iteration and the main thread to consume or ignore b2 outcomes in the correct sequence dictated by b1. The helper thread also retains influential stores for dynamic disambiguation and store-load forwarding. Any such store that is control-dependent on a delinquent branch is predicated on the branch’s outcome, which is necessary because the helper thread no longer has control-flow (except for the loop branch). Phelps also features dual decoupled helper threads for outer-inner loop pairs, for effective branch pre-execution when the inner loop has a short and unpredictable trip count.
items.abstract_zh: 分支预执行针对传统分支预测器无法预测的拖欠分支。辅助线程尝试在主线程之前解析分支。预执行的分支结果通过全局分支队列或本地分支队列（每个分支 PC 一个）传达到主线程的获取单元。本文讨论了两个关键挑战。 1) 处理依赖于另一个过失分支 b1 的控制的过失分支 b2。包含两个分支的先前工作都依靠辅助线程中 b1 的分支预测来确定是否预执行 b2。但 b1 很难预测，错误预测瓶颈只是从主线程转移到辅助线程。 2) 处理既影响拖欠分支又依赖于它的控制的存储指令。我们提出谓词辅助线程（Phelps）来解决这些挑战。 Phelps 为每个包含拖欠分支的内部循环构造一个辅助线程。所有拖欠分支，甚至是依赖于控制的分支 (b2)，都会在每次循环迭代中无条件地预先执行。每个分支队列基于循环迭代以锁步方式进行管理，允许辅助线程在每次迭代中存储 b1 和 b2 的结果，并允许主线程按照 b1 指示的正确顺序使用或忽略 b2 结果。辅助线程还保留有影响力的存储，以进行动态消歧和存储加载转发。任何依赖于拖欠分支的控制的此类存储都以分支的结果为基础，这是必要的，因为辅助线程不再具有控制流（循环分支除外）。 Phelps 还具有用于外部-内部循环对的双解耦辅助线程，以便在内部循环具有短暂且不可预测的行程计数时实现有效的分支预执行。

items.title: Piccolo: Large-Scale Graph Processing with Fine-Grained in-Memory Scatter-Gather.
items.abstract: Graph processing requires irregular, fine-grained random access patterns incompatible with contemporary off-chip memory architecture, leading to inefficient data access. This inefficiency makes graph processing an extremely memory-bound application. Because of this, existing graph processing accelerators typically employ a graph tiling-based or processing-in-memory (PIM) approach to relieve the memory bottleneck. In the tiling-based approach, a graph is split into chunks that fit within the on-chip cache to maximize data reuse. In the PIM approach, arithmetic units are placed within memory to perform operations such as reduction or atomic addition. However, both approaches have several limitations, especially when implemented on current memory standards (i.e., DDR). Because the access granularity provided by DDR is much larger than that of the graph vertex property data, much of the bandwidth and cache capacity are wasted. PIM is meant to alleviate such issues, but it is difficult to use in conjunction with the tiling-based approach, resulting in a significant disadvantage. Furthermore, placing arithmetic units inside a memory chip is expensive, thereby supporting multiple types of operation is thought to be impractical. To address the above limitations, we present Piccolo, an end-to-end efficient graph processing accelerator with fine-grained in-memory random scatter-gather. Instead of placing expensive arithmetic units in off-chip memory, Piccolo focuses on reducing the off-chip traffic with non-arithmetic function-in-memory of random scatter-gather. To fully benefit from in-memory scatter-gather, Piccolo redesigns the cache and miss-handling architecture (MHA) of the accelerator such that it can enjoy both the advantage of tiling and in-memory operations. Piccolo achieves a maximum speedup of 3.28 × and a geometric mean speedup of 1.62 ×, along with up to 59.7% reduction in energy consumption across various and extensive benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 图形处理需要不规则的、细粒度的随机访问模式，与当代片外存储器架构不兼容，导致数据访问效率低下。这种低效率使得图形处理成为内存极其有限的应用程序。因此，现有的图形处理加速器通常采用基于图形分块或内存处理（PIM）的方法来缓解内存瓶颈。在基于平铺的方法中，图被分成适合片上缓存的块，以最大限度地提高数据重用。在 PIM 方法中，算术单元放置在内存中以执行诸如归约或原子加法之类的操作。然而，这两种方法都有一些局限性，特别是在当前内存标准（即 DDR）上实现时。由于DDR提供的访问粒度远大于图顶点属性数据的访问粒度，因此浪费了大量的带宽和缓存容量。 PIM旨在缓解此类问题，但很难与基于切片的方法结合使用，从而导致显着的缺点。此外，将运算单元放置在存储器芯片内是昂贵的，因此支持多种类型的操作被认为是不切实际的。为了解决上述限制，我们提出了 Piccolo，一种端到端高效的图形处理加速器，具有细粒度的内存中随机分散-聚集功能。 Piccolo 没有将昂贵的算术单元放置在片外存储器中，而是专注于通过随机分散-聚集的存储器中的非算术函数来减少片外流量。为了充分受益于内存分散-聚集，Piccolo 重新设计了加速器的缓存和未命中处理架构 (MHA)，使其能够同时享受平铺操作和内存操作的优势。 Piccolo 的最大加速比为 3.28 倍，几何平均加速比为 1.62 倍，并且在各种广泛的基准测试中能耗降低了高达 59.7%。

items.title: PIMnet: A Domain-Specific Network for Efficient Collective Communication in Scalable PIM.
items.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM), where compute is moved closer to memory or data, has been explored to accelerate emerging workloads. Different PIM-based systems have been announced, each offering a unique microarchitectural organization of their compute units, ranging from fixed functional units to programmable general-purpose compute cores near memory. However, one fundamental limitation of PIM is that each compute unit can only access its local memory; access to “remote” memory must occur through the host CPU - potentially limiting application performance scalability. In this work, we first characterize the scalability of real PIM architectures using the UPMEM PIM system. We analyze how the overhead of communicating through the host (instead of providing direct communication between the PIM compute units) can become a bottleneck for collective communications that are commonly used in many workloads. To overcome this inter-PIM bank communication, we propose PIMnet - a PIM interconnection network for PIM banks that provides direct connectivity between compute units and removes the overhead of communicating through the host. PIMnet exploits bandwidth parallelism where communication across the different PIM bank/chips can occur in parallel to maximize communication performance. PIMnet also matches the DRAM packaging hierarchy with a multi-tier network architecture. Unlike traditional interconnection networks, PIMnet is a PIMcontrolled network where communication is managed by the PIM logic, optimizing collective communications and minimizing the hardware overhead of PIMnet. Our evaluation of PIMnet shows that it provides up to $85 \times$ speedup on collective communications and achieves a $11.8 \times$ improvement on real applications compared to the baseline PIM.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM)，其中计算更接近内存或数据，已被探索以加速新兴工作负载。不同的基于 PIM 的系统已经发布，每个系统都为其计算单元提供独特的微架构组织，范围从固定功能单元到靠近内存的可编程通用计算核心。然而，PIM 的一个基本限制是每个计算单元只能访问其本地内存；对“远程”内存的访问必须通过主机 CPU 进行，这可能会限制应用程序性能的可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们首先使用 UPMEM PIM 系统来表征真实 PIM 架构的可扩展性。我们分析了通过主机进行通信（而不是在 PIM 计算单元之间提供直接通信）的开销如何成为许多工作负载中常用的集体通信的瓶颈。为了克服这种 PIM 组间通信，我们提出了 PIMnet——一种用于 PIM 组的 PIM 互连网络，它提供计算单元之间的直接连接，并消除通过主机进行通信的开销。 PIMnet 利用带宽并行性，其中不同 PIM 组/芯片之间的通信可以并行发生，以最大限度地提高通信性能。 PIMnet 还将 DRAM 封装层次结构与多层网络架构相匹配。与传统的互连网络不同，PIMnet 是 PIM 控制的网络，其中通信由 PIM 逻辑管理，优化集体通信并最大限度地减少 PIMnet 的硬件开销。我们对 PIMnet 的评估表明，与基线 PIM 相比，它为集体通信提供了高达 85 美元的加速，并在实际应用中实现了 11.8 美元的改进。

items.title: Concord: Rethinking Distributed Coherence for Software Caches in Serverless Environments.
items.abstract: Costly accesses to global storage substantially limit the performance of serverless functions. To mitigate this overhead, data can be cached in the memory of the nodes where functions are executed. Existing caching schemes either (1) restrict a data item to be cached in a single node, causing frequent remote reads or (2) allow a data item to be cached in multiple nodes concurrently, adding substantial overhead to maintain cache coherence. Unfortunately, current approaches are suboptimal for the access patterns present in serverless workloads, which are characterized by frequent reads to small data items, strong temporal locality, and a small number of nodes that concurrently execute functions of the same application. Driven by these insights, we propose Concord, a distributed software caching system tailored to serverless environments. Concord allows multiple copies of the same data item to be cached in different nodes concurrently, allowing each cache to satisfy local reads. To maintain coherence across software caches, Concord proposes a directory-based distributed coherence protocol. The protocol is inspired by hardware cache coherence, and is enhanced to minimize coherence traffic, reduce contention points, and be robust to node failures and frequent coherence domain changes. Further, with the Concord coherence protocol, we unlock two new capabilities in serverless environments: transactional storage accesses and transparent data-aware function placement. Compared to state-of-the-art severless caching schemes, Concord running on a 16-node cluster speeds-up execution by 2.4 × and improves throughput by 1.7 ×, while using only 6.2MB of otherwise idle application memory (i.e., 4.8% of the total application memory).
items.abstract_zh: 对全局存储的昂贵访问极大地限制了无服务器功能的性能。为了减轻这种开销，可以将数据缓存在执行函数的节点的内存中。现有的缓存方案要么（1）限制数据项缓存在单个节点中，导致频繁的远程读取，要么（2）允许数据项同时缓存在多个节点中，增加了大量开销以维持缓存一致性。不幸的是，当前的方法对于无服务器工作负载中存在的访问模式来说并不是最优的，无服务器工作负载的特点是频繁读取小数据项、强时间局部性以及同时执行同一应用程序功能的节点数量较少。在这些见解的推动下，我们提出了 Concord，这是一种专为无服务器环境量身定制的分布式软件缓存系统。 Concord 允许同一数据项的多个副本同时缓存在不同的节点中，从而使每个缓存都能满足本地读取。为了保持软件缓存之间的一致性，Concord 提出了一种基于目录的分布式一致性协议。该协议受到硬件缓存一致性的启发，并进行了增强，以最大限度地减少一致性流量、减少争用点，并对节点故障和频繁的一致性域更改具有鲁棒性。此外，通过 Concord 一致性协议，我们在无服务器环境中解锁了两项新功能：事务存储访问和透明的数据感知功能放置。与最先进的无服务器缓存方案相比，在 16 节点集群上运行的 Concord 将执行速度提高了 2.4 倍，吞吐量提高了 1.7 倍，同时仅使用 6.2MB 的空闲应用程序内存（即总应用程序内存的 4.8%）。

items.title: DynamoLLM: Designing LLM Inference Clusters for Performance and Energy Efficiency.
items.abstract: The rapid evolution and widespread adoption of generative large language models (LLMs) have made them a pivotal workload in various applications. Today, LLM inference clusters receive a large number of queries with strict Service Level Objectives (SLOs). To achieve the desired performance, these models execute on power-hungry GPUs, causing inference clusters to consume large amounts of energy and, consequently, result in substantial carbon emissions. Fortunately, we find that there is an opportunity to improve energy efficiency by exploiting the heterogeneity in inference compute properties and the fluctuations in inference workloads. However, the diversity and dynamicity of these environments create a large search space, where different system configurations (e.g., number of instances, model parallelism, and GPU frequency) translate into different energy-performance trade-offs. To address these challenges, we propose DynamoLLM, the first energy-management framework for LLM inference environments. DynamoLLM automatically and dynamically reconfigures the inference cluster to optimize for energy of LLM serving under the services’ performance SLOs. We show that at a service level, on average, DynamoLLM conserves 52% of the energy and 38% of the operational carbon emissions, and reduces the cost to the customer by 61%, while meeting the latency SLOs.
items.abstract_zh: 生成式大语言模型 (LLM) 的快速发展和广泛采用使其成为各种应用程序中的关键工作负载。如今，LLM 推理集群收到大量具有严格服务级别目标 (SLO) 的查询。为了达到所需的性能，这些模型在耗电的 GPU 上执行，导致推理集群消耗大量能源，从而导致大量碳排放。幸运的是，我们发现有机会通过利用推理计算属性的异构性和推理工作负载的波动来提高能源效率。然而，这些环境的多样性和动态性创造了一个巨大的搜索空间，其中不同的系统配置（例如实例数量、模型并行性和 GPU 频率）会转化为不同的能源性能权衡。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 DynamoLLM，这是第一个适用于 LLM 推理环境的能源管理框架。 DynamoLLM 自动动态地重新配置推理集群，以优化服务性能 SLO 下 LLM 服务的能量。我们表明，在服务级别，DynamoLLM 平均节省 52% 的能源和 38% 的运营碳排放，并将客户的成本降低 61%，同时满足延迟 SLO。

items.title: Lincoln: Real-Time 50~100B LLM Inference on Consumer Devices with LPDDR-Interfaced, Compute-Enabled Flash Memory.
items.abstract: With the widespread use of large language models (LLMs), and with the privacy and cost concerns on cloud-based services, vendors are now pushing LLM inference to consumer devices. However, current attempts only enable real-time inference of low-quality small-sized LLMs. Large-sized LLMs have to load most of their weights from Flash storage for every execution iteration, which dominates the execution time of both the prefill and the generation phase. This performance bottleneck is attributed to both the low internal Flash memory bandwidth and the low transmission bandwidth between Flash and the Neural Processing Unit (NPU). To tackle these two challenges, we present Lincoln, a device-architecture co-design solution with LPDDR-interfaced, Compute-Enabled Flash Memory. On the device level, we boost the Flash internal bandwidth by improving upon existing array shrinking methods, to enable lower read latency and more parallel Flash planes within each Flash die. We specifically leverage 3D hybrid bonding, which is already adopted in consumer Flash products, to maintain high area efficiency and low density loss. On the architecture level, to leverage such increased internal bandwidth for resolving the transmission bottleneck, we propose two solutions for the two distinct phases of LLMs. For the compute-intensive prefill phase, we let Flash devices use the existing high-speed LPDDR interface (originally for DRAM), which offers much higher transmission bandwidth to the NPU than the conventional Flash interface, while maintaining good cost and area efficiency. For the memory-intensive generation phase, we rely on hybrid-bonding-based near-Flash computing to fully utilize the internal Flash bandwidth, and further equip with speculative decoding to eventually reach the real-time latency goal. Our evaluation shows that Lincoln enables real-time inference, with up to $13.23 \times$ and $254.1 \times$ speedups for LLM prefill and generation phases over conventional SSD-based systems.
items.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 的广泛使用，以及基于云的服务的隐私和成本问题，供应商现在正在将 LLM 推理推向消费设备。然而，当前的尝试只能实现低质量的小型 LLM 的实时推理。大型 LLM 必须在每次执行迭代时从闪存加载大部分权重，这主导了预填充和生成阶段的执行时间。这一性能瓶颈归因于内部闪存带宽较低以及闪存与神经处理单元 (NPU) 之间的传输带宽较低。为了应对这两个挑战，我们推出了 Lincoln，这是一种具有 LPDDR 接口、支持计算的闪存的设备架构协同设计解决方案。在设备层面，我们通过改进现有的阵列缩小方法来提高闪存内部带宽，以实现更低的读取延迟和每个闪存芯片内更多的并行闪存平面。我们专门利用消费级闪存产品中已采用的 3D 混合键合来保持高面积效率和低密度损失。在架构层面，为了利用增加的内部带宽来解决传输瓶颈，我们针对LLM的两个不同阶段提出了两种解决方案。对于计算密集型预填充阶段，我们让Flash设备使用现有的高速LPDDR接口（最初用于DRAM），它为NPU提供比传统Flash接口更高的传输带宽，同时保持良好的成本和面积效率。对于内存密集型生成阶段，我们依靠基于混合绑定的近闪存计算来充分利用内部闪存带宽，并进一步配备推测解码以最终达到实时延迟目标。我们的评估表明，Lincoln 可实现实时推理，与传统的基于 SSD 的系统相比，LLM 预填充和生成阶段的速度分别提高了 13.23 美元和 254.1 美元。

items.title: IRIS: Unleashing ISP-Software Cooperation to Optimize the Machine Vision Pipeline.
items.abstract: Contemporary Continuous Vision (CV) systems, crucial for robotics, Autonomous Driving (AD), and Extended Reality (XR), have challenging requirements in terms of performance and energy consumption. A standard CV System-on-a-Chip (SoC) pipeline includes an image capture frontend and a backend executing vision algorithms. The frontend typically samples the entire scene at a uniform high resolution (e.g., 4K). However, since not all image regions require this level of detail, this approach over-samples other less detailed areas that could be processed more efficiently at lower resolutions (e.g., 1080p). To address this inefficiency, we introduce IRIS (Image Region ISP-Software Cooperation). Our approach empowers the CV frontend to dynamically adjust the spatial resolution independently for each image region based on its content and backend application requirements. We augment the frontend’s Image Signal Processor (ISP) to adaptively downsample image regions using a Quadtree-like spatial division scheme guided by a low-overhead saliency scorer. The saliency scorer repurposes two valuable byproducts of the ISP-region edge density and perceived motion (optical flow)—that current ISPs already use to enhance image quality but discard afterward. IRIS saves memory bandwidth for image transmission and enables applications to process each image region at the most effective resolution, reducing latency and energy consumption. We validate our approach with both a state-of-the-art CV localization application and a standard Vision Transformer for image classification. IRIS significantly reduces tail latency, average latency, and energy consumption of modern mobile CV systems.
items.abstract_zh: 现代连续视觉 (CV) 系统对于机器人、自动驾驶 (AD) 和扩展现实 (XR) 至关重要，在性能和能耗方面具有挑战性的要求。标准 CV 片上系统 (SoC) 管道包括图像捕获前端和执行视觉算法的后端。前端通常以统一的高分辨率（例如 4K）对整个场景进行采样。然而，由于并非所有图像区域都需要这种细节级别，因此这种方法会对其他不太详细的区域进行过采样，这些区域可以在较低分辨率（例如 1080p）下更有效地处理。为了解决这种低效率问题，我们引入了 IRIS（图像区域 ISP-软件合作）。我们的方法使 CV 前端能够根据每个图像区域的内容和后端应用程序要求独立地动态调整空间分辨率。我们增强了前端的图像信号处理器（ISP），以使用由低开销显着性评分器引导的类似四叉树的空间划分方案来自适应地对图像区域进行下采样。显着性评分器重新利用了 ISP 区域边缘密度和感知运动（光流）的两个有价值的副产品，当前 ISP 已经使用它们来增强图像质量，但随后将其丢弃。 IRIS 节省了图像传输的内存带宽，并使应用程序能够以最有效的分辨率处理每个图像区域，从而减少延迟和能耗。我们使用最先进的 CV 本地化应用程序和用于图像分类的标准 Vision Transformer 来验证我们的方法。 IRIS 显着降低了现代移动 CV 系统的尾部延迟、平均延迟和能耗。

items.title: MLPerf Power: Benchmarking the Energy Efficiency of Machine Learning Systems from μWatts to MWatts for Sustainable AI.
items.abstract: Rapid adoption of machine learning (ML) technologies has led to a surge in power consumption across diverse systems, from tiny IoT devices to massive datacenter clusters. Benchmarking the energy efficiency of these systems is crucial for optimization, but presents novel challenges due to the variety of hardware platforms, workload characteristics, and system-level interactions. This paper introduces MLPerf® Power, a comprehensive benchmarking methodology with capabilities to evaluate the energy efficiency of ML systems at power levels ranging from microwatts to megawatts. Developed by a consortium of industry professionals from more than 20 organizations, coupled with insights from academia, MLPerf Power establishes rules and best practices to ensure comparability across diverse architectures. We use representative workloads from the MLPerf benchmark suite to collect $\mathbf{1, 8 4 1}$ reproducible measurements from 60 systems across the entire range of ML deployment scales. Our analysis reveals trade-offs between performance, complexity, and energy efficiency across this wide range of systems, providing actionable insights for designing optimized ML solutions from the smallest edge devices to the largest cloud infrastructures. This work emphasizes the importance of energy efficiency as a key metric in the evaluation and comparison of the ML system, laying the foundation for future research in this critical area. We discuss the implications for developing sustainable AI solutions and standardizing energy efficiency benchmarking for ML systems.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 技术的快速采用导致从微型物联网设备到大型数据中心集群的各种系统的功耗激增。对这些系统的能源效率进行基准测试对于优化至关重要，但由于硬件平台、工作负载特征和系统级交互的多样性，也带来了新的挑战。本文介绍了 MLPerf® Power，这是一种全面的基准测试方法，能够评估微瓦到兆瓦功率级别的机器学习系统的能源效率。 MLPerf Power 由来自 20 多个组织的行业专业人士组成的联盟开发，结合​​学术界的见解，建立了规则和最佳实践，以确保不同架构之间的可比性。我们使用 MLPerf 基准套件中的代表性工作负载从整个 ML 部署规模范围内的 60 个系统收集 $\mathbf{1, 8 4 1}$ 可重现的测量结果。我们的分析揭示了各种系统的性能、复杂性和能源效率之间的权衡，为设计从最小的边缘设备到最大的云基础设施的优化机器学习解决方案提供了可行的见解。这项工作强调了能源效率作为评估和比较机器学习系统的关键指标的重要性，为这一关键领域的未来研究奠定了基础。我们讨论了开发可持续人工智能解决方案和标准化机器学习系统能效基准的影响。

items.title: Understanding RowHammer Under Reduced Refresh Latency: Experimental Analysis of Real DRAM Chips and Implications on Future Solutions.
items.abstract: Read disturbance in modern DRAM chips is a widespread weakness that is used for breaking memory isolation, one of the fundamental building blocks of system security and privacy. RowHammer is a prime example of read disturbance in DRAM where repeatedly accessing (hammering) a row of DRAM cells (DRAM row) induces bitflips in physically nearby DRAM rows (victim rows). Unfortunately, shrinking technology node size exacerbates RowHammer and as such, significantly fewer accesses can induce bitflips in newer DRAM chip generations. To ensure robust DRAM operation, state-of-the-art mitigation mechanisms restore the charge in potential victim rows (i.e., they perform preventive refresh or charge restoration). With newer DRAM chip generations, these mechanisms perform preventive refresh more aggressively and cause larger performance, energy, or area overheads. Therefore, it is essential to develop a better understanding and in-depth insights into the preventive refresh to secure real DRAM chips at low cost. In this paper, our goal is to mitigate RowHammer at low cost by understanding the preventive refresh latency and the impact of reduced refresh latency on RowHammer. To this end, we present the first rigorous experimental study on the interactions between refresh latency and RowHammer characteristics in real DRAM chips. Our experimental characterization using 388 real DDR4 DRAM chips from three major manufacturers demonstrates that a preventive refresh latency can be significantly reduced (by 64%) at the expense of requiring slightly more (by 0.54%) preventive refreshes. To investigate the impact of reduced preventive refresh latency on system performance and energy efficiency, we reduce the preventive refresh latency and adjust the aggressiveness of existing RowHammer solutions by developing a new mechanism, Partial Charge Restoration for Aggressive Mitigation (PaCRAM). Our results show that by reducing the preventive refresh latency, PaCRAM reduces the performance and energy overheads induced by five state-of-the-art RowHammer mitigation mechanisms with small additional area overhead. Thus, PaCRAM introduces a novel perspective into addressing RowHammer vulnerability at low cost by leveraging our experimental observations. To aid future research, we open-source our PaCRAM implementation at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/PaCRAM.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 DRAM 芯片中的读取干扰是一个普遍存在的弱点，可用于破坏内存隔离，而内存隔离是系统安全和隐私的基本构建模块之一。 RowHammer 是 DRAM 中读取干扰的一个主要示例，其中重复访问（锤击）一行 DRAM 单元（DRAM 行）会导致物理上附近的 DRAM 行（受害者行）发生位翻转。不幸的是，技术节点尺寸的缩小加剧了 RowHammer 的问题，因此，显着减少的访问可能会在较新的 DRAM 芯片代中引发位翻转。为了确保稳健的 DRAM 运行，最先进的缓解机制会恢复潜在受害者行中的电荷（即，它们执行预防性刷新或电荷恢复）。随着新一代 DRAM 芯片的出现，这些机制会更积极地执行预防性刷新，并导致更大的性能、能源或面积开销。因此，有必要对预防性刷新有更好的理解和深入的了解，以低成本确保真正的 DRAM 芯片。在本文中，我们的目标是通过了解预防性刷新延迟以及减少刷新延迟对 RowHammer 的影响，以低成本缓解 RowHammer 的影响。为此，我们首次对真实 DRAM 芯片中的刷新延迟和 RowHammer 特性之间的相互作用进行了严格的实验研究。我们使用来自三个主要制造商的 388 个真实 DDR4 DRAM 芯片进行的实验表征表明，预防性刷新延迟可以显着减少（减少 64%），但代价是需要稍微增加（减少 0.54%）预防性刷新。为了研究减少预防性刷新延迟对系统性能和能源效率的影响，我们通过开发一种新机制“积极缓解的部分电荷恢复”(PaCRAM) 来减少预防性刷新延迟并调整现有 RowHammer 解决方案的积极性。我们的结果表明，通过减少预防性刷新延迟，PaCRAM 降低了五种最先进的 RowHammer 缓解机制带来的性能和能源开销，并且附加面积开销很小。因此，PaCRAM 引入了一种新颖的视角，利用我们的实验观察结果以低成本解决 RowHammer 漏洞。为了帮助未来的研究，我们在 https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/PaCRAM 上开源了 PaCRAM 实现。

items.title: To Cross, or Not to Cross Pages for Prefetching?
items.abstract: Despite processor vendors reporting that cache prefetchers operating with virtual addresses are permitted to cross page boundaries, academia is focused on optimizing cache prefetching for patterns within page boundaries. This work reveals that page-cross prefetching at the first-level data cache (L1D) is seldom beneficial across different execution phases and workloads while showing that state-of-the-art L1D prefetchers are not very accurate at prefetching across page boundaries. In response, we propose $M O K A$, a holistic framework for designing Page-Cross Filters, i.e., microarchitectural schemes that ensure effective and accurate prefetching across page boundaries. MOKA combines (i) hashed perceptron predictors that use prefetcher-independent program features, (ii) predictors that adapt decisions based on the system state (e.g., TLB pressure), and (iii) a scheme to dynamically optimize predictions across different execution phases and workload types. We use the MOKA framework to prototype a Page-Cross Filter, named DRIPPER, for three relevant L1D prefetchers (Berti [60], IPCP [61], BOP [57]). We show that DRIPPER accurately enables pagecross prefetching only when it is beneficial for performance. For instance, Berti [60] (state-of-the-art prefetcher) combined with DRIPPER improves single-core geomean performance over Berti that always permits page-cross prefetches and Berti that always discards page-cross prefetches by $\mathbf{1 . 7 \%}(\mathbf{1 . 2 \%})$ and $\mathbf{2 . 5 \%}(\mathbf{2 . 1 \%})$ across 218 seen (178 unseen) workloads, respectively. Across 300 8 -core mixes, the corresponding geomean speedups are $2.0 \%$ and $3.3 \%$. Finally, we show that DRIPPER provides consistent benefits when both 4KB pages and 2MB large pages are used.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管处理器供应商报告说，使用虚拟地址操作的缓存预取器允许跨越页面边界，但学术界仍专注于优化页面边界内模式的缓存预取。这项工作表明，一级数据缓存 (L1D) 的跨页预取在不同的执行阶段和工作负载中很少有好处，同时表明最先进的 L1D 预取器在跨页边界预取方面并不是非常准确。作为回应，我们提出了 $M O K A$，一个用于设计跨页过滤器的整体框架，即确保跨页边界有效和准确预取的微架构方案。 MOKA 结合了 (i) 使用独立于预取器的程序功能的散列感知器预测器，(ii) 根据系统状态（例如 TLB 压力）调整决策的预测器，以及 (iii) 跨不同执行阶段和工作负载类型动态优化预测的方案。我们使用 MOKA 框架为三个相关的 L1D 预取器（Berti [60]、IPCP [61]、BOP [57]）构建一个名为 DRIPPER 的跨页过滤器原型。我们证明，DRIPPER 仅在有利于性能时才准确地启用跨页预取。例如，Berti [60]（最先进的预取器）与 DRIPPER 相结合，比始终允许跨页预取的 Berti 和始终通过 $\mathbf{1 丢弃跨页预取的 Berti 提高了单核几何性能。 7 \%}(\mathbf{1 . 2 \%})$ 和 $\mathbf{2 . 5 \%}(\mathbf{2 . 1 \%})$ 分别在 218 个已见（178 个未见）工作负载中。在 300 个 8 核混合中，相应的几何平均加速分别为 $2.0 \%$ 和 $3.3 \%$。最后，我们表明 DRIPPER 在使用 4KB 页面和 2MB 大页面时提供一致的优势。

items.title: Interleaved Logical Qubits in Atom Arrays.
items.abstract: Neutral atom arrays have seen exciting progress as a platform for quantum computation. However, as we move towards the regime of fault-tolerance, the large-scale impact of fundamental features in these systems is not well-studied. In this work we point out that the use of movement in neutral atom arrays may set an unavoidable constraint on the speed of computation, erasing potential quantum advantage. As one solution, we propose a movement-free QEC architecture based on groups of interleaved surface codes. Our architecture enables fast, high-fidelity transversal CNOTs on surface codes in the same group. We also introduce interleaved lattice surgery to create high-capacity routing channels between groups. We validate our architecture through detailed numerical simulations of the underlying circuits and we evaluate its scalability through compilation of key benchmark applications. In regimes of high parallelism, we find our architecture leads to a $\sim 3 \times$ reduction in compute time. Our architecture leverages experimentally demonstrated dualspecies atom arrays which exhibit asymmetric interaction strengths that scale with $1 / r^{3}$ for interspecies interactions and with $1 / r^{6}$ for standard, intraspecies interactions. We examine how such scalings enable interleaving with high fidelity and propose how error rates required for QEC could be achieved. We also evaluate the tolerance of our architecture to two-qubit gate fidelities. We find the advantage of interleaving admits sizable tolerances of $\sim 1 \times$ to $3 \times$ increase in error rates. We conclude the benefits of our proposed interleaved architecture grants strong motivation for future experimental efforts targeting longer range dual-species gates.
items.abstract_zh: 中性原子阵列作为量子计算平台取得了令人兴奋的进展。然而，当我们走向容错机制时，这些系统中基本特征的大规模影响尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们指出，在中性原子阵列中使用运动可能会对计算速度产生不可避免的限制，从而消除潜在的量子优势。作为一种解决方案，我们提出了一种基于交错表面代码组的无移动 QEC 架构。我们的架构可以在同一组的表面代码上实现快速、高保真横向 CNOT。我们还引入了交错晶格手术来在组之间创建高容量的路由通道。我们通过底层电路的详细数值模拟来验证我们的架构，并通过关键基准应用程序的编译来评估其可扩展性。在高并行度的情况下，我们发现我们的架构可以减少 $\sim 3 \times$ 的计算时间。我们的架构利用实验证明的双物种原子阵列，该阵列表现出不对称相互作用强度，对于种间相互作用，可按 $1 / r^{3}$ 缩放；对于标准种内相互作用，可按 $1 / r^{6}$ 缩放。我们研究了这种缩放如何实现高保真交错，并提出如何实现 QEC 所需的错误率。我们还评估了我们的架构对两个量子位门保真度的容忍度。我们发现交错的优点是允许错误率增加 $\sim 1 \times$ 到 $3 \times$ 的相当大的容差。我们得出的结论是，我们提出的交错架构的好处为未来针对更长距离双物种门的实验工作提供了强大的动力。

items.title: Enterprise Class Modular Cache Hierarchy.
items.abstract: The IBM Z® platform is optimized for processing vast amounts of data and transactions with low latency in a highly virtualized and secured environment. The platform and its microprocessor chip are designed to deliver consistent system performance, throughput, and response latencies with sustained processor utilization of over $\mathbf{9 0 \%}$ under all workload conditions. The IBM Telum® and IBM Telum® ${ }^{\circledR}$ II designs introduced a novel modular and scalable cache hierarchy to the industry that is extendable to future platform generations, the adoption of emerging technologies, and new architecture enhancements, all of which are required to meet the continuously evolving needs of the mission critical workloads that run on the platform. This paper demonstrates the flow of processor fetch events and how the adaptive horizontal cache persistence algorithms work in this novel design. It explores the performance and system effects of cache size changes in this architecture. Finally, the paper explores how the resulting application of solutions leveraging these effects enhances the robustness of the next generation IBM Z caching solution embedded in the IBM Telum® II Processor, which improves mission critical workload performance while simultaneously enabling the generative AI capability.
items.abstract_zh: IBM Z® 平台经过优化，可在高度虚拟化和安全的环境中以低延迟处理大量数据和事务。该平台及其微处理器芯片旨在提供一致的系统性能、吞吐量和响应延迟，在所有工作负载条件下，处理器利用率持续超过 $\mathbf{9 0 \%}$。 IBM Telum® 和 IBM Telum® ${ }^{\circledR}$ II 设计向业界引入了一种新颖的模块化和可扩展的缓存层次结构，该层次结构可扩展到未来的平台、新兴技术的采用和新的架构增强，所有这些都需要满足在平台上运行的关键任务工作负载不断变化的需求。本文演示了处理器获取事件的流程以及自适应水平缓存持久性算法如何在这种新颖的设计中工作。它探讨了该架构中缓存大小变化的性能和系统影响。最后，本文探讨了利用这些效应的解决方案的最终应用如何增强嵌入 IBM Telum® II 处理器中的下一代 IBM Z 缓存解决方案的稳健性，从而提高关键任务工作负载性能，同时启用生成式 AI 功能。

items.title: CogSys: Efficient and Scalable Neurosymbolic Cognition System via Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design.
items.abstract: Neurosymbolic AI is an emerging compositional paradigm that fuses neural learning with symbolic reasoning to enhance the transparency, interpretability, and trustworthiness of AI. It also exhibits higher data efficiency making it promising for edge deployments. Despite the algorithmic promises and demonstrations, unfortunately executing neurosymbolic workloads on current hardware (CPU/GPU/TPU) is challenging due to higher memory intensity, greater compute heterogeneity and access pattern irregularity, leading to severe hardware underutilization. This work proposes CogSys, a characterization and co-design framework dedicated to neurosymbolic AI system acceleration, aiming to win both reasoning efficiency and scalability. On the algorithm side, CogSys proposes an efficient factorization technique to alleviate compute and memory overhead. On the hardware side, CogSys proposes a scalable neurosymbolic architecture with reconfigurable neuro/symbolic processing elements ($n s P E$) and bubble streaming (BS) dataflow with spatial-temporal (ST) mapping for highly parallel and efficient neurosymbolic computation. On the system side, CogSys features an adaptive workload-aware scheduler (adSCH) to orchestrate heterogeneous kernels and enhance resource utilization. Evaluated across cognitive workloads, CogSys enables reconfigurable support for neural and symbolic kernels and exhibits $\gt75 \times$ speedup over TPU-like systolic array with only $\lt5 \%$ area overhead, as benchmarked under the TSMC 28nm technology node. CogSys achieves $4 \times$ $96 \times$ speedup compared to desktop and edge GPUs. For the first time, CogSys enables real-time abduction reasoning towards human fluid intelligence, requiring only 0.3 s per reasoning task with $4 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$ area and 1.48 W power consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 神经符号人工智能是一种新兴的组合范式，它将神经学习与符号推理相融合，以增强人工智能的透明度、可解释性和可信度。它还表现出更高的数据效率，使其有望用于边缘部署。尽管有算法承诺和演示，但不幸的是，由于更高的内存强度、更大的计算异构性和访问模式不规则性，在当前硬件（CPU/GPU/TPU）上执行神经符号工作负载具有挑战性，导致硬件严重利用率不足。这项工作提出了CogSys，这是一种致力于神经符号AI系统加速的表征和协同设计框架，旨在赢得推理效率和可扩展性。在算法方面，CogSys 提出了一种有效的分解技术来减轻计算和内存开销。在硬件方面，CogSys 提出了一种可扩展的神经符号架构，具有可重新配置的神经/符号处理元件 ($n s P E$) 和带有时空 (ST) 映射的气泡流 (BS) 数据流，以实现高度并行和高效的神经符号计算。在系统方面，CogSys 具有自适应工作负载感知调度程序 (adSCH)，可以编排异构内核并提高资源利用率。经过认知工作负载的评估，CogSys 能够为神经和符号内核提供可重新配置的支持，并在 TPU 类脉动阵列上实现 $\gt75 \times$ 的加速，而面积开销仅为 $\lt5 \%$（在台积电 28nm 技术节点下进行基准测试）。与桌面和边缘 GPU 相比，CogSys 实现了 4 美元 x 96 美元的加速。 CogSys 首次实现了对人类流体智能的实时溯因推理，每个推理任务仅需要 0.3 秒，面积为 4 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$，功耗为 1.48 W。

items.title: Reviving In-Storage Hardware Compression on ZNS SSDs through Host-SSD Collaboration.
items.abstract: Zoned Namespace (ZNS) is an emerging SSD interface with great potential for performance and cost in largescale cloud SSD deployments. Enabling in-storage hardware compression on ZNS SSDs is promising for further enhancing the cost-effectiveness of ZNS-based storage infrastructures. However, based on our investigation, existing solutions based on the host-transparent methodology are sub-optimal on ZNS SSDs due to two intrinsic challenges: (1) locating compressed chunks and (2) harvesting space savings from compression.In this paper, we for the first time revisit the compression storage system architecture on the emerging ZNS SSD and propose to decouple compression execution with indexing. We propose CCZNS (CC: collaborative compression), an advanced ZNS interface that revives in-storage hardware compression on ZNS SSDs through a novel host-SSD collaborative approach. We present how CCZNS can benefit host software by performing a case study on RocksDB and ZenFS. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the CCZNS-based storage system significantly outperforms existing system solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 分区命名空间 (ZNS) 是一种新兴的 SSD 接口，在大规模云 SSD 部署中具有巨大的性能和成本潜力。在 ZNS SSD 上启用存储内硬件压缩有望进一步提高基于 ZNS 的存储基础设施的成本效益。然而，根据我们的调查，基于主机透明方法的现有解决方案在 ZNS SSD 上并不是最佳选择，因为存在两个内在挑战：(1) 定位压缩块和 (2) 从压缩中节省空间。在本文中，我们首次重新审视新兴 ZNS SSD 上的压缩存储系统架构，并提出将压缩执行与索引解耦。我们提出了 CCZNS（CC：协作压缩），这是一种先进的 ZNS 接口，可通过新颖的主机-SSD 协作方法恢复 ZNS SSD 上的存储内硬件压缩。我们通过对 RocksDB 和 ZenFS 进行案例研究来展示 CCZNS 如何使主机软件受益。大量实验表明，基于 CCZNS 的存储系统显着优于现有系统解决方案。

items.title: LAD: Efficient Accelerator for Generative Inference of LLM with Locality Aware Decoding.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as the cornerstone of content generation applications due to their ability to capture relations between newly generated token and the full preceding context. However, this ability stems from the attention mechanism for decoding that retains the entire generation history as key value cache (KV cache). As the generated sequence lengthens, the KV cache expands, causing a substantial memory access bottleneck. In advanced LLM generation systems running on GPUs, the attention mechanism for decoding accounts for more than 50% of the total inference time when the KV cache length reaches 4096. To address this issue, this paper introduces LAD (Locality Aware Decoding), an LLM generation accelerator with algorithm-hardware enhancements that significantly decrease KV cache access, resulting in considerable speedups and energy savings. A key insight underlying LAD is that when the attention score for a specific position remains fixed over the next several decoding steps, it is unnecessary to repeatedly retrieve the associated key and value at each step to reproduce the computation. Our analysis reveals that numerous positions exhibit notable numerical locality in attention scores through multiple decoding steps. Leveraging these insights, we have designed an innovative attention decoding computation method that decreases the frequency of accessing the key and value for positions demonstrating good locality, all while maintaining decoding accuracy. Extensive experiments show that LAD generates sequences with an average ROUGE-1 similarity of 97% compared to those generated by the original model. When the length of KV cache exceeds 2048, the high configuration of LAD accelerator achieves on average (geomean) $10.7 \times$ speedup and $52.4 \times$ energy efficiency for the attention mechanism compared to the A100 GPU. For end-to-end model inference, it also achieves on average $2.3 \times$ speedup and $13.4 \times$ energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已成为内容生成应用程序的基石，因为它们能够捕获新生成的令牌与之前的完整上下文之间的关系。然而，这种能力源于解码时的注意力机制，它保留了整个生成历史作为键值缓存（KV缓存）。随着生成的序列变长，KV 缓存也会扩展，从而导致严重的内存访问瓶颈。在运行在 GPU 上的高级 LLM 生成系统中，当 KV 缓存长度达到 4096 时，用于解码的注意力机制占总推理时间的 50% 以上。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了 LAD（局部感知解码），这是一种 LLM 生成加速器，其算法硬件增强功能可显着减少 KV 缓存访问，从而实现显着的加速和节能。 LAD 的一个关键见解是，当特定位置的注意力分数在接下来的几个解码步骤中保持固定时，无需在每个步骤重复检索关联的键和值来重现计算。我们的分析表明，通过多个解码步骤，许多位置在注意力分数中表现出显着的数值局部性。利用这些见解，我们设计了一种创新的注意力解码计算方法，该方法可以降低访问表现出良好局部性的位置的键和值的频率，同时保持解码准确性。大量实验表明，与原始模型生成的序列相比，LAD 生成的 ROUGE-1 序列平均相似度为 97%。当KV缓存长度超过2048时，与A100 GPU相比，高配置的LAD加速器的注意力机制平均（几何平均）$10.7\times$加速和$52.4\times$能源效率。对于端到端模型推理，它还实现了平均 2.3 美元的加速和 13.4 美元的能源效率。

items.title: OASIS: Object-Aware Page Management for Multi-GPU Systems.
items.abstract: The ever-growing need for high-performance computing has driven the popularity of employing multi-GPU systems. Modern multi-GPU systems employ unified virtual memory (UVM) to manage page placement and migration. However, the page management in UVM is application object agnostic. In this paper, we characterize the page access behaviors in relation to the application objects, and reveal that the beneficial page management policy varies according to (i) the different data objects within the same application, and (ii) the different execution phases of the same object. This motivates the need for dynamic and proactive page management in multi-GPU systems. To this end, we propose OASIS, which dynamically identifies object patterns during the execution and proactively determines the appropriate page management policies for these objects at runtime. Experimental results show that OASIS improves the performance over uniformly adopting on-touch migration, access counter-based migration, and duplication by an average of $\mathbf{6 4 \%}$, $\mathbf{3 5 \%}$, and $\mathbf{4 2 \%}$, respectively. Moreover, OASIS achieves a $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ performance improvement over the state-of-the-art technique (i.e., GRIT) while having significantly lower design complexity.
items.abstract_zh: 对高性能计算不断增长的需求推动了多 GPU 系统的普及。现代多 GPU 系统采用统一虚拟内存 (UVM) 来管理页面放置和迁移。然而，UVM 中的页面管理与应用程序对象无关。在本文中，我们描述了与应用程序对象相关的页面访问行为，并揭示了有益的页面管理策略根据（i）同一应用程序中的不同数据对象和（ii）同一对象的不同执行阶段而变化。这激发了多 GPU 系统中动态和主动页面管理的需求。为此，我们提出了 OASIS，它在执行过程中动态识别对象模式，并在运行时主动确定这些对象的适当页面管理策略。实验结果表明，OASIS 比统一采用触摸迁移、基于访问计数器的迁移和复制的性能分别平均提高了 $\mathbf{6 4 \%}$、$\mathbf{3 5 \%}$ 和 $\mathbf{4 2 \%}$。此外，与最先进的技术（即 GRIT）相比，OASIS 实现了 $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ 性能改进，同时设计复杂性显着降低。

items.title: Prosperity: Accelerating Spiking Neural Networks via Product Sparsity.
items.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are highly efficient due to their spike-based activation, which inherently produces bit-sparse computation patterns. Existing hardware implementations of SNNs leverage this sparsity pattern to avoid wasteful zero-value computations, yet this approach fails to fully capitalize on the potential efficiency of SNNs. This study introduces a novel sparsity paradigm called Product Sparsity, which leverages combinatorial similarities within matrix multiplication operations to reuse the inner product result and reduce redundant computations. Product Sparsity significantly enhances sparsity in SNNs without compromising the original computation results compared to traditional bit sparsity methods. For instance, in the SpikeBERT SNN model, Product Sparsity achieves a density of only 1.23% and reduces computation by $11 \times$, compared to bit sparsity, which has a density of 13.19%. To efficiently implement Product Sparsity, we propose Prosperity, an architecture that addresses the challenges of identifying and eliminating redundant computations in real-time. Compared to prior SNN accelerator PTB and the A100 GPU, Prosperity achieves an average speedup of $7.4 \times$ and $1.8 \times$, respectively, along with energy efficiency improvements of $8.0 \times$ and $193 \times$, respectively. The code for Prosperity is available at https://github.com/dubcyfor3/Prosperity.
items.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 由于其基于尖峰的激活而非常高效，这本质上会产生位稀疏计算模式。 SNN 的现有硬件实现利用这种稀疏模式来避免浪费的零值计算，但这种方法无法充分利用 SNN 的潜在效率。本研究引入了一种称为“乘积稀疏性”的新颖稀疏范式，它利用矩阵乘法运算中的组合相似性来重用内积结果并减少冗余计算。与传统的位稀疏方法相比，乘积稀疏性显着增强了 SNN 中的稀疏性，而不会影响原始计算结果。例如，在 SpikeBERT SNN 模型中，与密度为 13.19% 的位稀疏性相比，乘积稀疏性仅实现了 1.23% 的密度，并减少了 11 美元的计算量。为了有效地实现产品稀疏性，我们提出了 Prosperity，这是一种解决实时识别和消除冗余计算挑战的架构。与之前的 SNN 加速器 PTB 和 A100 GPU 相比，Prosperity 的平均加速分别为 7.4 美元和 1.8 美元，能效分别提高了 8.0 美元和 193 美元。 Prosperity 的代码可在 https://github.com/dubcyfor3/Prosperity 获取。

items.title: QPRAC: Towards Secure and Practical PRAC-based Rowhammer Mitigation using Priority Queues.
items.abstract: JEDEC has introduced the Per Row Activation Counting (PRAC) framework for DDR5 and future DRAMs to enable precise counting of DRAM row activations. PRAC enables a holistic mitigation of Rowhammer attacks even at ultra-low Rowhammer thresholds. PRAC uses an Alert Back-Off (ABO) protocol to request the memory controller to issue Rowhammer mitigation requests. However, recent PRAC implementations are either insecure or impractical. For example, Panopticon, the inspiration for PRAC, is rendered insecure if implemented per JEDEC’s PRAC specification. On the other hand, the recent UPRAC proposal is impractical since it needs oracular knowledge of the ‘top- N ‘ activated DRAM rows that require mitigation.This paper provides the first secure, scalable, and practical RowHammer solution using the PRAC framework. The crux of our proposal is the design of a priority-based service queue (PSQ) for mitigations that prioritizes pending mitigations based on activation counts to avoid the security risks of prior solutions. This provides principled security using the reactive ABO protocol. Furthermore, we co-design our PSQ, with opportunistic mitigation on Refresh Management (RFM) operations and proactive mitigation during refresh (REF), to limit the performance impact of ABO-based mitigations. QPRAC provides secure and practical RowHammer mitigation that scales to Rowhammer thresholds as low as 71 while incurring a $0.8 \%$ slowdown for benign workloads, which further reduces to $0 \%$ with proactive mitigations.
items.abstract_zh: JEDEC 推出了适用于 DDR5 和未来 DRAM 的每行激活计数 (PRAC) 框架，以实现 DRAM 行激活的精确计数。即使在超低 Rowhammer 阈值下，PRAC 也能全面缓解 Rowhammer 攻击。 PRAC 使用警报退避 (ABO) 协议来请求内存控制器发出 Rowhammer 缓解请求。然而，最近的 PRAC 实施要么不安全，要么不切实际。例如，PRAC 的灵感来源 Panopticon 如果按照 JEDEC 的 PRAC 规范实施，就会变得不安全。另一方面，最近的 UPRAC 提案是不切实际的，因为它需要对需要缓解的“前 N”个激活 DRAM 行的深刻了解。本文提供了第一个使用 PRAC 框架的安全、可扩展且实用的 RowHammer 解决方案。我们提案的关键是设计一个基于优先级的服务队列（PSQ），用于缓解措施，根据激活计数对待处理的缓解措施进行优先级排序，以避免先前解决方案的安全风险。这使用反应式 ABO 协议提供了原则性的安全性。此外，我们共同设计 PSQ，通过刷新管理 (RFM) 操作的机会性缓解和刷新期间的主动缓解 (REF)，以限制基于 ABO 的缓解措施对性能的影响。 QPRAC 提供安全实用的 RowHammer 缓解措施，可扩展到低至 71 的 Rowhammer 阈值，同时对良性工作负载造成 $0.8 \%$ 的减速，通过主动缓解措施进一步降低至 $0 \%$。

items.title: DAPPER: A Performance-Attack-Resilient Tracker for RowHammer Defense.
items.abstract: RowHammer vulnerabilities pose a significant threat to modern DRAM-based systems, where rapid activation of DRAM rows can induce bit-flips in neighboring rows. To mitigate this, state-of-the-art host-side RowHammer mitigations typically rely on shared counters or tracking structures. While these optimizations benefit benign applications, they are vulnerable to Performance Attacks (Perf-Attacks), where adversaries exploit shared structures to reduce DRAM bandwidth for co-running benign applications by increasing DRAM accesses for RowHammer counters or triggering repetitive refreshes required for the early reset of structures, significantly degrading performance. In this paper, we propose secure hashing mechanisms to thwart adversarial attempts to capture the mapping of shared structures. We propose DAPPER, a novel low-cost tracker resilient to Perf-Attacks even at ultra-low RowHammer thresholds. We first present a secure hashing template in the form of DAPPER-S. We then develop Dapper-H, an enhanced version of DapperS, incorporating double-hashing, novel reset strategies, and mitigative refresh techniques. Our security analysis demonstrates the effectiveness of DAPPER-H against both RowHammer and Perf-Attacks. Experiments with 57 workloads from SPEC2006, SPEC2017, TPC, Hadoop, MediaBench, and YCSB show that, even at an ultra-low RowHammer threshold of 500, DapperH incurs only a 0.9% slowdown in the presence of Perf-Attacks while using only 96 KB of SRAM per 32GB of DRAM memory.
items.abstract_zh: RowHammer 漏洞对基于 DRAM 的现代系统构成重大威胁，其中 DRAM 行的快速激活可能会导致相邻行发生位翻转。为了缓解这种情况，最先进的主机端 RowHammer 缓解措施通常依赖于共享计数器或跟踪结构。虽然这些优化有利于良性应用程序，但它们很容易受到性能攻击（Perf-Attacks），其中攻击者利用共享结构通过增加 RowHammer 计数器的 DRAM 访问或触发结构早期重置所需的重复刷新来减少共同运行良性应用程序的 DRAM 带宽，从而显着降低性能。在本文中，我们提出了安全哈希机制来阻止对抗性尝试捕获共享结构的映射。我们提出了 DAPPER，这是一种新型低成本跟踪器，即使在超低 RowHammer 阈值下也能抵御 Perf-Attacks。我们首先以 DAPPER-S 的形式提出一个安全哈希模板。然后，我们开发了 Dapper-H，这是 DapperS 的增强版本，结合了双哈希、新颖的重置策略和缓解刷新技术。我们的安全分析证明了 DAPPER-H 对抗 RowHammer 和 Perf-Attacks 的有效性。对来自 SPEC2006、SPEC2017、TPC、Hadoop、MediaBench 和 YCSB 的 57 个工作负载进行的实验表明，即使在 500 的超低 RowHammer 阈值下，DapperH 在存在 Perf-Attacks 的情况下也只会导致 0.9% 的速度下降，同时每 32GB DRAM 内存仅使用 96 KB SRAM。

items.title: A Hardware-Software Design Framework for SpMV Acceleration with Flexible Access Pattern Portfolio.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplications (SpMV) are notoriously challenging to accelerate due to their highly irregular data access pattern. Although a fully customized static accelerator design may be adequate for small problems that can fit entirely within an on-chip memory buffer, practical SpMV problems are large and have dynamic matrix structures that cannot easily be optimized at compile time. To address this need for trade-off between flexibility and performance, we present SPASM, a hardware-software framework that accelerates SpMV computation using a customizable portfolio of data access patterns as templates and a reconfigurable hardware to support their run-time execution. SPASM extracts local data access patterns of the input matrices and derives a set of template patterns to encode these inputs. Subsequently, a novel hardware computing structure is proposed to support vectorized computation and flexible switching between different template patterns for each tile computation. Furthermore, SPASM leverages the global compositions of input matrices to derive hardware configuration and workload schedules that improve load balancing among the parallel processing units. Importantly, although SPASM can optimize the pattern portfolio for a particular set of expected input matrices, the generated hardware can flexibly be used to accelerate SpMV of different input patterns albeit with reduced performance. Experimental results show that SPASM can achieve an average $2.81 \times$ speedup compared to the state-of-the-art SpMV accelerator while keeping a relatively low customization cost.
items.abstract_zh: 众所周知，稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 因其高度不规则的数据访问模式而难以加速。尽管完全定制的静态加速器设计可能足以解决完全适合片上内存缓冲区的小问题，但实际的 SpMV 问题很大，并且具有动态矩阵结构，无法在编译时轻松优化。为了满足灵活性和性能之间的权衡需求，我们提出了 SPASM，这是一种硬件软件框架，它使用可定制的数据访问模式组合作为模板和可重新配置的硬件来支持其运行时执行，从而加速 SpMV 计算。 SPASM 提取输入矩阵的本地数据访问模式，并派生一组模板模式来对这些输入进行编码。随后，提出了一种新颖的硬件计算结构来支持矢量化计算以及每个图块计算的不同模板模式之间的灵活切换。此外，SPASM 利用输入矩阵的全局组合来导出硬件配置和工作负载调度，从而改善并行处理单元之间的负载平衡。重要的是，尽管 SPASM 可以针对一组特定的预期输入矩阵优化模式组合，但生成的硬件可以灵活地用于加速不同输入模式的 SpMV，尽管性能会降低。实验结果表明，与最先进的 SpMV 加速器相比，SPASM 可以实现平均 2.81 倍的加速，同时保持相对较低的定制成本。

items.title: Exploring the Performance Improvement of Tensor Processing Engines through Transformation in the Bit-weight Dimension of MACs.
items.abstract: General matrix-matrix multiplication (GEMM), serving as a cornerstone of AI computations, has positioned tensor processing engines (TPEs) as increasingly critical components within existing GPUs and domain-specific architectures (DSA). Our analysis identifies that the prevailing architectures primarily focus on dataflow or operand reuse strategies, when considering the combination of matrix multiplication with multiply-accumulator (MAC) itself, it provides greater optimization space for the design of TPEs. This work introduces a novel perspective on matrix multiplication from a hardware standpoint, focusing on the bit-weight dimension of MACs. Through this lens, we propose a finer-grained TPE notation, using matrix triple loops as an example, introducing new methods and ideas for designing and optimizing PE microarchitecture. Based on the new notation and transformations, we propose four optimization techniques that achieve varying degrees of improvement in timing, area, and power consumption. We implement our design in RTL using the SMIC-28nm process. Applying our methods to four classic TPE architectures (include systolic array [20], 3D-Cube [27], multiplier-adder tree [48], and 2D-Matrix [30]), we achieved area efficiency improvements of $1.27 \times, 1.28 \times, 1.56 \times$, and $1.44 \times$, and $1.04 \times, 1.56 \times, 1.49 \times$, and $1.20 \times$ for energy efficiency respectively. When applied to a bit-slice architecture, we achieved a $12.10 \times$ improvement in energy efficiency and $2.85 \times$ in area efficiency compared to Laconic [38]. Our Verilog HDL code, along with timing, area, and power reports for circuit synthesis in URL: https://github.com/wqzustc/High-Performance-Tensor-Processing-Engines.
items.abstract_zh: 通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 作为人工智能计算的基石，将张量处理引擎 (TPE) 定位为现有 GPU 和特定领域架构 (DSA) 中日益重要的组件。我们的分析发现，主流架构主要关注数据流或操作数重用策略，当考虑矩阵乘法与乘累加器（MAC）本身的结合时，它为TPE的设计提供了更大的优化空间。这项工作从硬件的角度介绍了矩阵乘法的新颖视角，重点关注 MAC 的位权重维度。通过这个镜头，我们提出了一种更细粒度的 TPE 表示法，以矩阵三重循环为例，引入了设计和优化 PE 微架构的新方法和思路。基于新的符号和变换，我们提出了四种优化技术，在时序、面积和功耗方面实现了不同程度的改进。我们使用 SMIC-28nm 工艺在 RTL 中实现我们的设计。将我们的方法应用于四种经典的 TPE 架构（包括脉动阵列 [20]、3D-Cube [27]、乘法器加法器树 [48] 和 2D-Matrix [30]），我们实现了 $1.27 \times、1.28 \times、1.56 \times$、$1.44 \times$ 和 $1.04 \times$ 的面积效率改进，能源效率分别为 1.56 ×、1.49 ×和 1.20 ×。当应用于位片架构时，与 Laconic [38] 相比，我们的能源效率提高了 12.10 美元，面积效率提高了 2.85 美元。我们的 Verilog HDL 代码以及电路综合的时序、面积和功耗报告位于 URL：https://github.com/wqzustc/High-Performance-Tensor-Processing-Engines。

items.title: HSMU-SpGEMM: Achieving High Shared Memory Utilization for Parallel Sparse General Matrix-Matrix Multiplication on Modern GPUs.
items.abstract: Sparse general matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) is a core primitive for numerous scientific applications. Traditional hash-based approaches fail to strike a balance between reducing hash collisions and efficiently utilizing fast shared memory, which significantly undermines the performance of executing SpGEMM on GPUs. To address this issue, this paper introduces a novel accumulator design that achieves high shared memory utilization on modern GPUs. For the proposed high shared memory utilization algorithm, i.e., HSMU-SpGEMM<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>, we further optimize different symbolic stages. Our evaluations with four state-of-the-art hash-based SpGEMM libraries (Nsparse, spECK, OpSparse, and NVIDIA’s cuSPARSE) on three NVIDIA GPUs (Ampere, Ada Lovelace, Turing) demonstrate significant performance benefits from HSMU-SpGEMM.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>HSMU-SpGEMM is available at https://github.com/wuminqaq/HSMUSpGEMM
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 是众多科学应用的核心原语。传统的基于哈希的方法无法在减少哈希冲突和有效利用快速共享内存之间取得平衡，这显着降低了在 GPU 上执行 SpGEMM 的性能。为了解决这个问题，本文介绍了一种新颖的累加器设计，可在现代 GPU 上实现高共享内存利用率。对于所提出的高共享内存利用率算法，即 HSMU-SpGEMM<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>，我们进一步优化了不同的符号阶段。我们在三个 NVIDIA GPU（Ampere、Ada Lovelace、Turing）上使用四个最先进的基于哈希的 SpGEMM 库（Nsparse、spECK、OpSparse 和 NVIDIA cuSPARSE）进行的评估表明 HSMU-SpGEMM 具有显着的性能优势。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>HSMU-SpGEMM 可在 https://github.com/wuminqaq/HSMUSpGEMM 上获取

items.title: BOSS: Blocking algorithm for optimizing shuttling scheduling in Ion Trap.
